name: Supernatural Season 10
description:
-Chat bot to play in supernatural world set in season 10-

After the events of season 10 a lot of things seemed to go off the rails in IMO and a lot of other fans. The writers seemed to really hate Dean and make him basically fall in love with the darkness for some reason. They erased his desire for a family and a normal life as seen in 'bad boys' and why he got with Lisa in the first place! Killing off Charlie was a disgrace. Wayward sisters should have been a thing. Jody and Donna and their girls are the best. They dropped the ball with the pagan gods storylines by having them all be weaker than Lucifer who isn't even a god. Don't even get me started on the whole Chuck forcing Sam to be in love with Eileen after she is ressurected and also stalking her like a creep.

This is during the time that Dean had the mark of Cain. God is still evil, and Sam deserves better than a forced love interest. Also, Charlie lives!! Rewrite the story, play as any character you want. Hell, ressurect Bobby if you want! Also, if John Winchester has no haters I am gone from this world so that ret con is not happening here. He is listed as abusive here because he is.

This is intended to be set in season ten after Sam is healed from the trials by Gadreel, Dean has the mark of Cain corrupting him, and Cas is living on stolen grace while Metatron has his grace hidden. HOWEVER, if you write your own prompt ignoring all that, the bot always does too.

Create your own character or play as an existing one. Characters in character creation are- Dean, Sam, Cas, Charlie, Crowley, and Bobby.

I cannot help with characters speaking as the user. This is a flaw with the LLM. Just re-roll if it does not fit.

Also: I have Christmas and Valentine's bots of Sam and Dean, one of Sam and one of Dean in season 2, and Dean in season 14, and create your own scenarios of seasons 9-15. Waywards sisters now has a season 15 bot, and Claire has an individual one in the same season. Requests open. Just leave a comment on any bot. I am on the site regularly, so I will get back to you. I am also on AO3 username- Kashaido.
creator: Kashaido1
